summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Product CRUD management and Invoice status editing functionality. Backend APIs are 100% functional, frontend UI working correctly with proper integration.
passed_tests: Admin login with provided credentials (admin@naturalplylam.com/admin123)
Navigate to Products page from sidebar
Products list loads with name, category, price, stock status (9+ products)
Add Product button opens slide-over form correctly
Product form accepts all inputs: name, category (Plywood/Timber), price, stock quantity
Product creation saves and shows success toast
Category filter buttons work (All, Plywood, Timber)
Search by product name functions correctly
Product row click opens detail view in slide-over
Product menu shows view/edit/delete options
Navigate to Invoices page successfully
Invoice list loads with 4 total invoices and proper status displays
Click invoice row opens detail page with complete information
Change Status button opens status selection modal
All invoice status options available (Paid, Pending, Overdue, Cancelled, Partially Paid)
Invoice status updates successfully with confirmation
Dashboard loads correctly with navigation and KPIs
Backend API testing: 12/12 tests passed (100% success rate)
Product CRUD APIs: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE all working
Invoice status update API working for all valid status values
Search and filtering APIs functional
Authentication APIs working properly
